title: Hey team!
author: DesperatePound1100
selftext: I once was working with a trader that used a software platform that did a really good job of sourcing rumors and chatter regarding specifically small cap companies. It held a live feed that brought up rumors like the second they came out. Does anyone know what service this is or have any suggestions for one I should look into? Pay services are okay

comments.author: AdAmbitious1988
comments.body: Come join the convo at r/beatingthemarket some good banter and focus on small caps / biotech !
